When they arrived they fought against the Gaylords and Stoned Freaks so hard that Freaks and Gaylords ended their war because these new Cobras were so fierce it became a major burden for Freaks and Gaylords.

The Insane Popes dominated this neighborhood and did not take kindly to this migration unless one was a Latin Count. The Counts had free reign of this area with the blessing of the Popes but Satan Disciples and Spanish Cobras were not allowed.

Spanish Cobras was another gang that wasn't from the area but often traveled into the area starting problems with Brazers. The war with Spanish Cobras was so severe it was never forgiven up to present years.
In the year 1978 Imperial Gangsters, Spanish Cobras, Maniac Latin Disciples and Latin Eagles created the " United Latino Organization " ( ULO )
The war was ugly when it happened and it led to issues with Insanes as well as Imperial Gangsters began having feuds with Insane Campbell Boys, Spanish Cobras and YLO Cobras

The Simon City Royals and Popes were now allies with the newly formed 'United Latino Organization' which was a street coalition of the north side gangs that had joined the Folk Nation in prison such as Spanish Cobras and Latin Disciples.
Under Y.L.O the Cobras and Disciples teamed up on the much larger Latin Kings in East Humboldt Park and against white gangs like C-Notes, Taylor Jousters and Chi-West.
At this section Pachucos fought violent wars against Spanish Cobras and other enemies.
This shooting sparked a major war not only between YLOCDs but also the entire Spanish Cobra and Latin Disciple nations
The Hell's Devils now joined the fight against Latin Kings, Spanish Cobras, Simon City Royals and Paulina and Barry Community.
In 1979, the Vikings made a connection with the Spanish Cobras and the Latin Disciples through Young Blood.
Spanish Cobras were upset with Insane Cambell Boys for breaking the peace treaty in 1994 and demanded the ICBs disband

The Insane Deuces officially switched alliances from People to Folk and became part of the Spanish Cobra led 'Insane Family'. The Deuces were to be accepted into Folks under the Spanish Cobra's responsibility and representation. Deuces and Cobras have become heavily close since the Deuces flipped.
In the year 1979, the Dragons became attached to the "Insane" alliance alongside the Spanish Cobras of East Humboldt Park, the two became very tight.
To make it worse, fellow Folks the Satan Disciples became enemies of the Cobras.
In the year 1981, King Cobras connected with the Spanish Cobras and joined the Insane family from the north side of the city. King Cobras then adopted the Spanish Cobra diamond and other symbols.
the OAs came together with some allies like Spanish Cobras and Imperial Gangsters that also had wars going on with Latin Kings and Gaylords
The Latin Brothers established a tight alliance with Spanish Cobras from Cicero and Armitage in Belmont-Cragin because of strong family ties along Mexican blood lines.
The Jivers from Blackhawk and Bosworth allied with the Spanish Cobras against the Maniacs and joined the Insane alliance
In the year 1996, the Insane Latin Jivers from Blackhawk and Bosworth didn't stay in the Insane family too long before they broke out into war with the Spanish Cobras
Folk Nation — c. 1979 – 2000 or later
War started with the Insane Unknowns in 1974 because both gangs added 'Insane' to their name that year and did not want to share it with each other.
The Cobras also had very strong connections with the Black Gangster Disciples and the Latin Disciples and showed the pitchfork in all their literature and spray painted gang symbols.
For many years Spanish Cobras were very tight with Orquestra Albany, Insane Dragons, Ashland Vikings and the Harrison Gents.
The Latin Lovers also dropped Maniac but they went over to Insane and stayed there.
The Cobras found a replacement for the Gents, the C-Notes who previously were an independent organization and a part of the UFO alliance.
The Spanish Cobras and Insane familia took in the YLO Cobras, Insane Orquestra Albany, Insane Ashland Vikings, Insane Deuces, Insane Campbell Boys, Insane Dragons and the Insane Harrison Gents.

The Cobras in Cicero made lots of noise but had a unlikely friendship with Cicero Latin Counts until a fight broke out at a party at 18th and 47th after a Cobra smashed a beer bottle into a Latin Count's teeth. After this incident the war with the Counts was costly and Cicero police were cracking down on the gangbanging heading into the 2000s, this Cobra section had to close.
The Spanish Cobras from this area would eventually overcome the Stoned Freaks in 1994 taking away all their turf.
they fought through multiple generations of gangs starting with the white gangs then onto the Maniac Latin Disciples, Imperial Gangsters, Milwaukee Kings, Insane Unknowns and several others.

In the year 1997, the Spanish Cobras moved in just outside of Two Two hood at 16 th & 47 th ; however, the two gangs still did not mix well because the Spanish Cobras wanted to take over Two Two hood. The Spanish Cobras were not nice about it and became very aggressive and disrespectful to the Two Two Boys and nasty war ensued.
Now Maniac Campbell Boys got into vicious wars with Insane Dragons, Spanish Cobras, YLO Cobras and Insane Campbell Boys.
YLOs decided to click up with Spanish Cobras and Latin Disciples by 1976

Wrightwood and Laramie now flourished as now there was a lot of Playboys hanging out in the park and viciously fighting Spanish Cobra invaders. The Playboys successfully beat the Cobras back and the Cobras gave up trying to take over that park.
The Future Stones had the same rivals as the P.R. Stones such as Simon City Royals, Spanish Cobras and Assyrian Eagles.
By the mid-1970s the Spanish Lords were fighting with Spanish Cobras and Latin Disciples ( MLDs )

Even though the Jousters were outsiders they still wanted to preserve the American way of life that they felt the majority of Puerto Rican migrants did not want to preserve so the Jousters and Gaylords joined forces as they fought against Warlords , Latin Kings , Spanish Lords , Imperial Gangsters , Spanish Cobras and Latin Disciples.
Lord Capone became acquainted with co-worker at Norweigen Hospital nicknamed Wee Wee who was a Spanish Cobra from Artesian.  The two became work friends despite being in rival gangs

org:black-p-stone-nation.description: Chicago nation founded as Blackstone Rangers by Jeff Fort and Eugene Hairston at St. Charles Institution; renamed Black P. Stone Nation (1966); later El Rukn under Fort. People Nation affiliate.

sources.title: Almighty Black P Stone Nation — UnitedGangs
Almighty Black P. Stone Nation - Wikipedia

edges.evidence: In 1981, Jeff Fort of the EL Rukns called a meeting at 'The Fort' for the EL Rukns and top leaders of gangs allied to the EL Rukns or at least allied with other allies to attend. The Latin Kings were especially summoned for this historic meeting as Latin Kings, Black P Stones, EL Rukns and Vice Lords were the main front runners for making this alliance official.

The Four Corner Hustlers, Conservative Vice Lord, Insane Vice Lords, Renegade Vice Lords, Cicero Insane Vice Lords and Imperial Insane Vice Lords allied up with Black P Stones against the EL Rukns by 1981 and Vice Lords and Fours began hanging out on the south side.

Jeff Fort then drew up an arrangement for the Gangster Stones to keep them close especially since Moose and Gangster Stones still believed in several of the teachings of the Stones that Jeff Fort bestowed on the BPSN. Jeff Fort sent a few men to Moose's house to meet in the basement around 1977 to offer a blueprint for an alternative to the Gangster Stones becoming El Rukns, this demonstration was the 'Cold Soldier Army' or 'C.S.A' that would become ingrained in Gangster Stone literature.
The GBOs then agreed to hold a meeting with the Insane Deuces and the P.R. Stones to discuss a war with Latin Kings

In 1985, Jeff Fort ordered the murders of several King Cobras in April of 1985. According to court documents in the case of United States vs. Andrews, Jeff Fort wanted complete control of the heroin trade at 54th and Bishop in the Back of the Yards neighborhoods and 67th and Stoney Island in the Woodlawn neighborhood.
This group was known as 'Black Goon Squad Gangsters' as they were described as in 1984 newspapers as they went to war with El Rukns over drug turf.
Eventually in the 1980s the SGDs opened Olive and Clark in the Edgewater neighborhood which was dominated by the P.R. Stones street gang and once they found out about SGDs a nasty war broke out
the west side Vice Lords began having it out with EL Rukns from the south side attending the same theater
represent one of Michigan's longest-standing Blood-affiliated criminal street gangs
BPSN continues to operate as a People Nation-aligned Blood set
conflicts centered around Crip sets and Folk-affiliated rivals
maintaining a steady presence through narcotics activity and long-running conflicts with Crip and Folk-aligned groups

org:folk-nation.description: The Folk Nation is a multiethnic alliance of street gangs formed on November 11, 1978 at Stateville Correctional Center in Illinois by Larry Hoover of the Gangster Disciples. Hoover persuaded leaders of large black, white, and Latino Chicago gangs to join. Member gangs include Gangster Disciples, Black Disciples, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Maniac Latin Disciples, Simon City Royals, Spanish Gangster Disciples, La Raza Nation, and Imperial Gangsters. They identify with the six-pointed Star of David, the number 6, pitchforks, and right-side symbolism. Their primary rival is the People Nation. They maintain an alliance with the Crips in prison known as '8-ball.'

edges.evidence: conflicts centered around Crip sets and Folk-affiliated rivals
Rivals referenced in reporting or public records have included: Gangster Disciples , Folk Nation, Crips , Various other block-level street cliques
Rivals: GDs, Latin Kings, SUR-13, Crips, Folk Nation-aligned crews

org:people-nation.description: The People Nation is a multiethnic alliance of street gangs formed in 1978 in Chicago by the Vice Lords (Bobby Gore), Black P. Stones (Jeff Fort), and Latin Kings (Gustavo Colon) as a counter to the Folk Nation. Member gangs include Vice Lords, Latin Kings, Black P. Stones, Mickey Cobras, Four Corner Hustlers, Gaylords, and Latin Counts. They identify with the five-pointed star, five-pointed crown, left-side symbolism, and the phrase 'all is well.' Their motto against rivals: 'five alive, six must die' (referencing Folk Nation's six-pointed star).

sources.title: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation — Wikipedia

org:college-kidnappers.description: A Chicago-based group of University of Illinois alumni who kidnapped wealthy mobsters for ransom, active in the early 1930s. Led by Theodore 'Handsome Jack' Klutas, the group consisted of ten members. They targeted mobsters because they were unlikely to go to police and could pay ransoms.

org:imperial-chaplains.description: Imperial Chaplains was a street gang founded circa 1948 in Chicago. Disbanded around 1980.

edges.evidence: a group of Puerto Rican, Irish and African American boys from Harrison and Western in the Near West Side neighborhood were forced to protect their neighborhood from invading gang like the Egyptian Cobras, Taylor Street Dukes, Clovers and Imperial Chaplains.

In the fall of 1958 when the Vice Lords hit the streets of North Lawndale they aggressively attempted a complete takeover of the whole North Lawndale neighborhood, rivals like the Imperial Chaplains stood in their way.

org:taylor-dukes.description: Taylor Dukes was a street gang founded 1954 in Chicago. Disbanded around 1980.

edges.evidence: The Dukes also fought the legendary Ambrose gang that also formed because of the Dukes
The Dukes also fought the Harrison Gents in the later 50s and early 60s

org:rampants.description: The Rampants were a street gang in Chicago's Heart of Chicago (West Pilsen) neighborhood, active from the late 1950s. Territory ran from Damen to Ashland along 18th Street. Many members later became Ambrose when they absorbed the Little Rampants in 1964.

edges.evidence: Ambrose had no war with Rampants or Spartans and were close allies
Deuces also became bitter enemies of the Satan Disciples and the Rampants along 18th Street.
Rampants would clash violently with Ambrose and Spartans and these were Rampants worst enemies.
In the year 1973, Boogie was killed by Latin Kings and shortly after this by 1975 the Rampants stopped operations.

org:taylor-jousters.description: The Taylor Street Jouster Nation was a European-American (Italian/Mexican) Chicago street gang that started on the Near West Side at Taylor and Oakley in Little Italy around 1960. Named after the medieval sport of jousting. Symbols: knight's helmet, two crossed lances, cross with four slashes. Allied with the Chicago Outfit and Gaylords. North side branches formed 1969-70 joined the WPO (White Power Organisation) and UFO (United Five Organisation) with Gaylords, Playboys, C-Notes, and Ventures. The original Taylor Street members (mostly Mexican by then) rejected the north side's white power stance. Most sections closed by mid-1980s; last active sets (Hanson Park, 46th/Talman) lasted until ~1996. Fully inactive by 2005.

edges.evidence: Jousters and Gaylords had a legendary alliance which would help bring Taylor Jousters to Belmont-Cragin. The alliance Gaylords had with Jousters was the G.J.N or Gaylord Jouster nation.
This also made the Taylor Jousters the first enemies of the Imperial Gangsters.

In the year 1973, the Gaylords, C-Notes, Taylor Jousters, and PVP all got together at a meeting on the corner of Damen and Milwaukee in the Wicker Park neighborhood to discuss a merger between these five gangs that would be known as the 'United Five Organization' or UFO
The Dragons also managed to open turf at Palmer and Kilpatrick and Austin and Diversey in the Belmont-Cragin neighborhood which brought wars with Taylor Jousters and Latin Brothers.
they viciously battled Palmer Street Gaylords, Lawndale Gaylords, the Simon City Royals from Drake and Wolfram and Christiana and Wellington and the Taylor Jousters from Sawyer and Altgeld.

The Latin Brothers mainly slugged it out with gangs that occupied nearby Hansen Park that was in the nearby Belmont-Cragin neighborhood and right across the train tracks, such as the Taylor Jousters that were building up a strong presence there.
The Jivers had some of the same enemies as the MLDs like Gaylords, Latin Kings, Taylor Jousters, Chi-West, Spanish Lords, Warlords and C-Notes
Together the United Neighborhoods went against UFO allied gangs like PVR/PRP , Taylor Jousters , Gaylords and Chi-West
Jousters allied with the Playboys and Ventures to create the P.V.J or Playboys Ventures and Jousters.
instead they fought white greaser clubs like C-Notes , Chi-West , Taylor Jousters , Gaylords and the Simon City gang

At this time the Taylor Dukes were ready to give up the gang life and start families after they graduated high school, however, they still wanted the neighborhood to be protected from Egyptian Cobras and Vice Lords from Maxwell Street Market area or the projects in the area. The Dukes rested away everything to Pete Bianco to run a new group that would be a spin off of the Dukes. This new group would become the 'Taylor Street Jousters.'
The Jousters resumed fighting against the Egyptian Cobras and now had new enemies like Vice Lords, Black Panthers and Harrison Gents.

in this area the Jousters fought hard with Simon City Royals , Latin Eagles and Puerto Rican Stones.

The Jousters also spread to the west of Logan Square into the Irving Park neighborhood at Agatite and Kilbourn where they fought the Insane Popes.

Maniac Latin Disciples , Imperial Gangsters , Latin Kings , Latin Brothers , Simon City Royals , Insane Unknowns and Latin Pachucos all came in to invade the park and the war was on.

org:thorndale-jag-offs.description: Thorndale Jag Offs was a street gang founded 1962 in Chicago. Disbanded around 1990.

sources.title: Thorndale Jag Offs - Chicago Gang History

edges.evidence: On April 15, 1972 the Black P Stones attacked Bob's Restaurant and smashed all the windows, the TJOs went on the defense and attacked the Stones which resulted in a massive gang brawl as bottles and chains were being used.

The fighting between the two gangs flared up again in April when someone pulled the fire alarm at Senn High School so a fight could break out between the gangs, in this fight Puerto Rican gangs joined in especially the Puerto Rican Stones gang who were allies of the Black P Stones, this brawl caused the school to close for a while that school year.

It was around that time when the Berwyn and Winthrop Latin Kings were starting out in Edgewater which started a nasty rivalry between the two gangs that would not dominate Edgewater in the later 1970s.

org:latin-scorpions.description: Latin Scorpions was a street gang founded 1964 in Chicago. Disbanded around 1980.

edges.evidence: The Scorpions made peace with Latin Kings right away in 1964 in order to join in the fight against the white greaser gangs.

org:black-souls.description: Black Souls is a street gang founded 1968 in Chicago.

edges.evidence: After the death of Willis, the Mad Black Souls began having conflicts with the Four Corner Hustlers now that Pee Wee was deceased.

Monroe Banks met with Jack Bobo and Sam McKay and forged a legendary agreement for peace on the west side. The 'Solid,' '440' concepts were created in 1987 to signify that Souls and Fours were 'Solid' with each other and their relationship was tight.

According to court documents Black Soul members were infuriated over the death of Black Soul member Tom Slick and now they wanted revenge...The Black Souls marked Vice Lord Chief Jerome Wells for death
GBS and BGDs made lots of money together selling heroin in the 80s and 90s.

The Breeds also opened up in West Garfield Park (New Life Breeds) and clicked up with the Black Souls in that community as they battled several Vice Lord factions.

org:hells-devils.description: Hell's Devils was a street gang founded circa 1975 in Chicago. Disbanded around 1982.

org:tap-boyz-chicago.description: The TAP Boyz (The Arabian Posse) was a Chicago-based Arab-American street gang formed in 1992 at 63rd Street and Kedzie Avenue. Formed in response to anti-Arab sentiment from rival gangs following the Gulf War — their goal was to protect the Arab-American community from racially motivated assaults. Allied with Latin Kings. Disbanded in 1999 after losing members to Gangster Two-Six and Almighty Ambrose. Colors were white and red; symbol was a four-pointed star, occasionally using a crescent moon to represent Islam. Also had presence in Bridgeview, Illinois. Independent of Folk and People Nations.

sources.title: Tall Arabian Posse - Chicago Gang History

edges.evidence: Ambrose has fought several bloody wars with Rec City Gangster Disciples, Black Disciples, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Party Players, Party People, Akrohs, TAP Boyz, Two Six, Insane Popes, City Knights and Latin Kings

Hate crimes against the Arabs on 63 rd Street were starting to happen in the late summer to early autumn mainly by members of street gangs like Ambrose , Krazy Getdown Boys and Satan Disciples

In the year 1996, several TAP Boys and non-gang related Arab kids were hanging out in front of an arcade in Bridgeview when suddenly several of them were struck down by gun fire as Two Sixs shot them up.

org:tall-arabian-posse.description: The TAP Boyz (The Arabian Posse) was a Chicago-based Arab-American street gang formed in 1992 at 63rd Street and Kedzie Avenue. Formed in response to anti-Arab sentiment from rival gangs following the Gulf War — their goal was to protect the Arab-American community from racially motivated assaults. Allied with Latin Kings. Disbanded in 1999 after losing members to Gangster Two-Six and Almighty Ambrose. Colors were white and red; symbol was a four-pointed star, occasionally using a crescent moon to represent Islam. org:bricc-boy-crips-long-beach.description: The Bricc Boy Crips are based in North Long Beach, California. In 2015, California Attorney General Kamala Harris announced the indictment of 32 members for operating a $14.3 million identity theft and tax fraud scheme, stealing over $3.3 million through fraudulent tax returns using stolen identities.

org:dgaf.description: Don't Give A Fuck (DGAF) was a mostly African-American crew based in the Long Beach area of Los Angeles County.

org:filthy-crip.description: Eastside Long Beach Filthy Crip are a predominately Black street gang located on the eastside of Long Beach occupying the area of 19th Street and Locust.

org:original-hood-crips-long-beach.description: African-American Crip set based in North Long Beach, also known as the North Side Original Hood Crips (NSOHC). Established in the early-to-mid 1980s near 68th Way and White Avenue.

sources.title: Original Hood Crips Long Beach — UnitedGangs

org:stevenson-village-crips.description: The Stevenson Village Crips (SVC) are an African-American Crip set on the West Side of Carson, California, one of several Crip sets in the Carson area.

org:victoria-park-crips.description: The Victoria Park Crips (VPC) also known as Victoria Park Carson Crips (VPCC) are predominantly, but not exclusively, an African-American street gang located on the Eastside in Carson, California.

org:mac-mafia-crips.description: The Mac Mafia Crips (MMC) also known as the Double M Gang is primarily, but not exclusively, an African-American street gang located in North Long Beach, California.

org:rollin-80s-west-coast-crips.description: The Rollin 80s West Coast Crips originated around the Springdale West Apartment Complex, located on Spring Street and Santa Fe, in the city of Long Beach. They are apart of the Rollin O’s (Crips) and are associated with the Neighborhood Crips (2x).

org:efcc.description: Long Beach Exotic Family City Crip (EFCC) is a predominately Asian-American & Cambodian gang located on the Eastside of Long Beach, California in Cambodia Town.

org:boulevard-mafia-crips.description: The Boulevard Mafia Crips (BMC) are an African-American street gang located in North Long Beach, California, originating in the early 1980s during the crack epidemic era. They are involved in narcotics distribution and feud with rival gangs in surrounding neighborhoods.

org:crips.description: The Crips are a primarily African-American alliance of street gangs founded in Los Angeles in 1969 by Raymond Washington and Stanley Williams. With 30,000-35,000 members in 800 sets across 41 US states, they are one of the largest and most violent gang associations in the United States. Members have traditionally worn blue since 1973 (in tribute to founding member Curtis 'Buddha' Morrow who was killed that year). The Crips' internal rivalries are as deadly as their war with the Bloods — the Rollin 60s vs Eight Tray Gangster Crips feud (since 1979) caused the Hoovers to split off entirely. Their growth was fueled by the crack cocaine epidemic of the 1980s. They maintain an alliance with the Folk Nation in prisons known as '8-ball.'

sources.title: Almighty Black P. Stone Nation — Wikipedia

org:budlong-gangster-crips.description: Long Gangster Crip are a predominately African-American street gang located in unincorporated South Los Angeles County and are part of the Rollin 100s Crips alliance.

sources.title: Team BudLong Gangster Crips BudLong Gangster Crip — StreetGangs

org:westside-99-mafia-crips.description: Westside 99 Mafia Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located near Normandie & Century in Unincorporated Los Angeles County.

org:spook-town-compton-crips.description: Spook Town Compton Crips are an African-American street gang located on the eastside of Compton. The have a close alliance with Acacia Blocc Compton Crips and the Farm Dog Comtpon Crip, represented by the ATF identity.

org:under-ground-crips-103.description: The Under Ground Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located on the westside of South Los Angeles between Budlong and Western Avenues from 103rd to 108th Streets. The UGCs are part of the Rollin 100s Crip alliance which started in jail during the early 1990s.

org:watergate-crips-in-hawthorne.description: Water Gate Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located in the city of Hawthorne. The WGCs are part of the Rollin 100s Crip alliance.

org:samoan-warrior-bounty-hunters.description: A Samoan-American Blood gang based in the Carson area of Los Angeles, affiliated with the Bounty Hunter Bloods.

org:scotts-dale-piru.description: Scotts Dale Piru are a predominately African-American street gang located in the Avalon Village community of Carson, California.

org:center-view-piru.description: African-American Blood/Piru gang based on the East Side of Carson, California along Centerview Drive. Part of the Piru alliance, active since the 1980s.

org:grace-avenue-piru.description: The Grace Avenue Piru is a Blood-affiliated gang based in Carson, California, with African-American and Samoan membership, part of the Piru alliance in the Carson area which has a significant Polynesian presence.

org:scott-park-piru-carson.description: The Scott Park Pirus originated in the early 1980’s, originally known as the Scott Park Killers. They are named after a public park (Scott Park) on Catskills Ave, between 232nd Street and 236th Street.

org:yellow-henry-gang.description: The Yellow Henry Gang was a 19th-century New Orleans street gang active during the early 1870s and late 1880s. Originally led by Turpo, it was taken over by "Yellow" Henry Stewart after Turpo's arrest in 1877. The gang engaged in burglaries, armed robberies, and extortions, attracting many prominent criminals. It disbanded after leader Henry died in prison in 1886 and briefly reformed in 1888 before final dissolution in 1892.

org:charlestown-gang.description: Irish American organized crime gang based in Charlestown, Boston, headed by the McLaughlin brothers. Active from the 1950s until 1966, the gang controlled gambling and loan sharking on the docks and carried out contract killings for the Patriarca and Genovese crime families. They were destroyed in a gang war with the Winter Hill Gang, resulting in the deaths or imprisonment of its leaders.

org:green-counts.description: A street gang based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, active in the early 1950s. Their turf centered at 21st and Green Streets, and they specialized in armed robbery, kidnapping, and weapons dealings. The gang gained notoriety after member Joseph 'Blackie' Battel was sentenced to life for a robbery murder. A separate, unaffiliated group also operated under the same name in West Philadelphia.

org:ka-gang.description: The K&A Gang is a predominantly Irish-American criminal network based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, founded after World War II. Originally a burglary ring, it later expanded into loansharking, illegal gambling, racketeering, and drug trafficking. The gang controlled Philadelphia's Irish-American underworld for much of the late 20th century and maintains ties with other organized crime groups.

sources.title: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction — Wikipedia

org:lenox-boys.description: One of the oldest and most dangerous street gangs in Boston, Massachusetts, originating in the Lenox Street Projects in Roxbury possibly dating back to the 1950s. The gang has been active since at least the 1980s, involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and murder. They have engaged in long-standing feuds with rival gangs such as the Columbia Point Dawgs.

org:mullen.description: The Mullen Gang was an Irish-American street gang operating in South Boston, Massachusetts, founded in the 1950s. Engaged in racketeering, armed robbery, auto theft, and burglary, it fought a decade-long war with the Killeen Gang for control of criminal rackets. In 1972, both gangs were consolidated under the Winter Hill Gang.

org:columbia-point-dawgs.description: Criminal organization and street gang based in Boston, Massachusetts, founded in 1988. Involved in murder, drug trafficking, and violence, with one of the largest drug operations in New England. Known for wearing Philadelphia Phillies or Pittsburgh Pirates hats and driving expensive vehicles. In 2015, 48 members were arrested in a major gang takedown.

org:orchard-park-trailblazers.description: A street gang based in the Roxbury area of Boston, Massachusetts, primarily active since the late 1980s. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and murder, and has been engaged in a long-running feud with the Columbia Point Dawgs. Law enforcement crackdowns in the 1990s and 2000s led to multiple arrests and indictments.

org:lucerne-doggz.description: Street gang based in the Lucerne Street area of Mattapan, Boston, founded in 2003. Primarily African American, involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and murder. In 2006, the gang was responsible for 37 shootings, accounting for 10% of all shootings in Boston that year.

org:the-yogurt-connection.description: A drug smuggling ring based in Indianapolis, Indiana, operating in the late 1970s and early 1980s. Organized by Linda Leary and her sons Richard and Paul Heilbrunn, it smuggled an estimated 250,000 pounds of marijuana from Colombia, Jamaica, and Thailand into eleven midwestern states, valued at $50-100 million.

org:native-mob.description: The Native Mob is a Native American street gang founded in the 1990s in Minneapolis, Minnesota. It is one of the largest and most violent Native American gangs in the U.S., active in Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado, and South Dakota. The gang engages in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, and murder, with an estimated 200 members as of 2021.

org:red-skin-kingz.description: Former Native American street gang founded in 2003 in Lukachukai, Arizona, operating on the Navajo Nation. Engaged in drug trafficking, carjacking, kidnapping, and murder. Characterized by law enforcement as immensely violent. Now defunct.

org:somali-outlaws.description: The Somali Outlaws are a Somali American street gang based in the Minneapolis–Saint Paul metropolitan area, active since the 2000s. The gang operates primarily around the Karmel Mall in south Minneapolis and the Cedar-Riverside neighborhood, with additional territory in Saint Paul and Nashville. Their activities include drug trafficking and human trafficking.

org:rollin-90s-crips.description: The Rollin 90’s Crips are Often confused with the Rollin 90’s West Coast Crips, which is another street gang located around Vermont Ave and Manchester Blvd.

org:rollin-30s-harlem-crips.description: The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are a set of the Crips street gang alliance, formed by Belizean American Crips who moved from South Los Angeles to Belize and then to Harlem, New York. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, prostitution, murder, and robbery. It was established in New York City in the late 1980s or early 1990s by Dalmin "Diamond" Mayen and his associates.

org:r30crips.description: Original Harlem Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located in the Jefferson Park area of South Los Angeles.
